title: lycopodiella longipes
intro: Lycopodiella longipes, also known as the long-footed club moss, is a species of club moss in the family Lycopodiaceae. It is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the ancient lineage of plants known as lycopods. Traditionally, Lycopodiella longipes has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues, including wounds and skin infections. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or tincture, and its health benefits are said to include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and boosting the immune system.
